The company told TechCrunch it is now shipping the first batch of its high-dexterity hand to researchers […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> As a deadly heatwave grips Europe, Rome leans on a bracelet to watch its elderly https://thenextweb.com/news/rome-smart-bracelet-elderly-heatwave Mon, 29 Jun 2026 13:58:57 +0000 TheNextWeb=9ba1ed0546b602e7bb685bf40f10331b Dina Gazzella is 85, and on her wrist is a small black band that looks like a watch and does rather more than tell the time. “If I feel unwell, this is a lifesaver,” she told Reuters. In a summer that has turned lethal across Europe, that is not a figure of speech.The bracelet is […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Omen AI raises $31m to watch the water inside AI data centres https://thenextweb.com/news/omen-ai-raises-31m-to-watch-the-water-inside-ai-data-centres Mon, 29 Jun 2026 13:47:39 +0000 TheNextWeb=9a7fbc89140ecd6ad25b1f1f6a050b58 The unglamorous truth about the AI boom is that some of its hardest problems are plumbing. As data centres pack more GPUs into every rack and run them hotter, the fluid that keeps the chips from cooking has started, occasionally, to grow bacteria. That is the problem Omen AI has built a company around, and […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Google Cloud will sell specialist AI models built for science https://thenextweb.com/news/google-cloud-science-ai-models-sandboxaq Mon, 29 Jun 2026 13:36:59 +0000 TheNextWeb=ef2ecde1b213ca5624f7aa8b6bd3c305 Google is adding SandboxAQ’s ‘large quantitative models’ to its cloud marketplace, pairing Gemini with AI trained on scientific equations and laboratory data. The large language models that power most of the AI industry are very good at words and surprisingly unreliable at numbers. Google’s latest move is an admission that, for science, a different kind […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> RELX lines up another £100M buyback as its 2026 repurchases roll on https://thenextweb.com/news/relx-100-million-share-buyback-july Mon, 29 Jun 2026 13:33:35 +0000 TheNextWeb=09fe6af4dde93be943f392b1ea250657 RELX does not make headlines the way a chip foundry or an AI lab does, which is rather the point of the business. It has now decided that selling the tools is not as valuable as owning the mine. The company agreed to acquire Iridium Communications for about $8bn, paying $54 per […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Self-driving firm Momenta opens $752mn Hong Kong IPO https://thenextweb.com/news/momenta-hong-kong-ipo-self-driving Mon, 29 Jun 2026 12:28:15 +0000 TheNextWeb=bcf404e9d19a117c90cfa7d4ae152dea Momenta is heading to the public markets. The Suzhou-based company started taking investor orders this week under stock code 6880. It is […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Flock’s surveillance cameras are spreading fast across the US https://thenextweb.com/news/flock-surveillance-cameras-spread-us Mon, 29 Jun 2026 12:20:01 +0000 TheNextWeb=4bb61cefe05792791692d7f7586bb9cc Most people call them automated licence plate readers, or ALPRs. They sit beside roads and log every car that passes. Flock Safety dominates the market. Engadget reports that Flock makes the vast majority of the 100,000-plus readers now blanketing the US. Calling them licence plate readers undersells them. Reading plates is the main job, but […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Google earthquake alerts warned 11.4M before Venezuela’s quakes https://thenextweb.com/news/google-earthquake-alerts-venezuela-android Mon, 29 Jun 2026 12:08:11 +0000 TheNextWeb=9d56c39a39c30a62b9f4c6cb60096a46 Venezuela has no national earthquake warning system. Yet moments before two huge quakes hit on Wednesday, millions of phones lit up. Google earthquake alerts reached 11.4 million people, the company says, buying some of them up to two minutes to act. The warnings came from Google’s Earthquake Alerts system, which turns ordinary Android phones into […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> South Korea bets $880bn to win the AI era https://thenextweb.com/news/south-korea-ai-investment-880bn-chips-data-centres Mon, 29 Jun 2026 11:37:02 +0000 TheNextWeb=36e1bfaccafd20fc4b1619f84d2f9eac South Korea has placed its biggest bet yet on the AI era. The plan commits at least $880bn over a decade to chips, data centres and robots. It is the boldest South Korea AI investment to date, and the government says speed is now the only way to survive.
